creator: andrey.zverev@electro-com.ru
text:
Hello, please read following manual:
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/ru/books/porters-handbook/porting-testing.html
Section 3.4, 3.5, 3.6 it will make you PR better next time.

Better send new port with shar(4) section 3.4
Since you have wrong pkg-plist, read 3.5, 3.6 section.

WBR,
Andrej Zverev
